message:
style: apply rustfmt and downgrade mask depth check to debug_assert

Apply rustfmt formatting adjustments:
- src/combinator/race.rs: collapse multi-line assert_eq! calls for
  size_of_val comparisons into single lines
- src/sync/mutex.rs: collapse multi-line OwnedMutexGuard::try_lock
  bindings into single lines

In src/gen_server.rs, replace the assert_with_log! macro invocation
for the mask_depth overflow check with a standard debug_assert!. The
mask depth check is a programming invariant (exceeding MAX_MASK_DEPTH
indicates a bug in mask nesting logic), so debug_assert is more
appropriate: it fires in debug/test builds but compiles away in
release, avoiding the overhead of the logging assertion macro in
production for what is purely a development-time correctness check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
